meaning: adj.火的,火焰的,炽热的,热烈的,暴躁的,[眼]炯炯有神的
examples: The sky turned from fiery orange to lemon yellow.
A helicopter crashed in a fiery explosion in Vallejo.
It was quite the revelation for a man whose fiery rhetoric often stirred anger.
This conciliatory tone was in striking contrast to Mr Arzalluz's sometimes irascible and always fiery language.
